hero.description: A penultimate-year student passionate about quantitative finance, data, and machine learning through building scalable technology solutions that make a real impact.

about.heading: Driven by curiosity, powered by data
about.p1: I am Allen Lu Zhao Quan, a penultimate-year student at Nanyang Technological University majoring in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence. My journey into quantitative analysis began with a conversation with a senior, who helped me realise that my mathematical background and finance were not two separate worlds and that insight reframed everything, opening my eyes to the elegance of mathematical models in predicting real-world phenomena.
about.p2: My aspiration is to work at the intersection of data and finance, whether researching trading algorithms at a quantitative hedge fund, building scalable systems at a leading tech company, or creating innovative solutions that bridge both worlds.
about.p3: When I am not coding or crunching numbers, I love to read, play poker, hit the gym, and make money.

i1.title: Intern, Quantitative Analyst @ PhillipCapital (IFS Capital)
i1.p1: Enhanced current GLM pricing model (Poisson/Gamma) to quantify rating factor relativities for private motor portfolios, exploring alternative models including Tweedie and GAM. The Tweedie model achieved a Gini gain of 0.126, outperforming the baseline model.
i1.p2: Designed Monte Carlo simulations to model stochastic claim outcomes for 9,253 motor insurance policies under a Tweedie GLM framework, identifying the 99th-percentile loss ratio ~4.54% above expected levels, quantifying portfolio tail risk.
i1.p3: Developed SQL pipelines in Snowflake to compute borrower-level credit metrics (utilisation ratios, working-capital exposure, investment limits) and implemented rule-based classification to surface eligibility signals via Tableau dashboards for loan decisioning.

i2.title: Intern, Strategy & Business Intelligence Analyst @ Adroit Investment Technologies
i2.p1: Researched emerging AI technologies across various sectors and prepared teasers, industry outlook reports, and statistical analyses for prospective clients, contributing to a 33% increase in client acquisition for the month of May.
i2.p2: Managed components of financial statements using Power BI, including Capital Accounts, Capital Calls, and Capital Distribution.
i2.p3: Operated across the full stack of a Learning Management System (LMS) for a children's learning school on the Odoo platform, handling UI/UX adjustments, business logic workflows, and data model configurations. The design was shortlisted by the CEO as pitching material.
i2.p4: Implemented Excel algorithms to clean and cross-reference 2,000 entries of investment data, enabling strategic report generation and stakeholder-ready insights.
i2.p5: Prepared internal and external investor decks akin to M&A pitchbooks, integrating macroeconomic trends (e.g. US tariffs, air cargo rates) with company performance.

i3.title: Intern, Data Analytics & Management @ SCAL Academy
i3.p1: Managed and cleaned records for 1,900 trainees from April to July 2024 using Excel VBA for certificate generation.
i3.p2: Developed an automated data entry system that optimised the mass certificate generation process, resulting in a 75% reduction in man-hours.
i3.p3: Coordinated Ad-hoc tele calling from clients and trainees, ensuring all disputes and queries were addressed in time and reduced callback rate by 50%

i4.title: Intern, Actuary @ AIA (Grinweiv)
i4.p1: Devised key presentations for insurance companies， namely DirectAsia and Allied World Assurance, covering Customer Acquisition and Financial Modelling, projecting a 20% increase in client count over 1–3 years. Won overall best ideation.
i4.p2: Analysed option-based policy payoff structures (Call, Put, Straddle, Butterfly, Condor) to understand hedging mechanics in insurance product design.
i4.p3: Appointed weekly Team Lead, managing a team of 6 in administrative matters, collating and reporting feedback on training and well-being to the supervisor.

i5.title: Intern, Systems Engineer @ Defence Science and Technology Agency
i5.p1: Utilised visual tools to construct Command Centre Dashboards for a Just-in-Time Data Switchboard used during threat and crisis management. Dashboard enhancements were approved by the Head of Technology for implementation.
i5.p2: Devised a presentation of a prototype dashboard, dissecting its strengths and weaknesses to inform future development cycles.

p1.title: CAPM Portfolio Optimiser
p1.p: Built an end-to-end quantitative portfolio optimisation engine from scratch using live market data from Yahoo Finance. Estimated per-stock alpha and beta via OLS regression, then applied CAPM-implied expected returns as inputs to three strategies: Maximum Sharpe Ratio, Minimum Variance, and Equal-Weight; all solved via SciPy's SLSQP solver. Constructed the full Markowitz Efficient Frontier and backtested all three strategies against cumulative $1,000 growth.

p2.title: Deep Learning for Dense Video Captioning
p2.p: Implemented the Vid2Seq framework, a visual-language model that jointly localises and describes events in untrimmed video using CLIP-based visual extraction and a T5 sequence-to-sequence backbone. Implemented METEOR and CIDEr evaluation metrics from scratch and conducted ablation experiments across three CLIP encoders and T5 model sizes. Pre-training improved CIDEr from 59.62% to 70.05%, exceeding author-reported benchmarks.

p3.title: Wealth Wellness Hub
p3.p: Full-stack wealth management platform built in response to a real Schroders problem statement, unifying traditional and digital assets into a single dashboard. Engineered a financial wellness scoring engine with LLM-powered insights via Groq's llama3-8b. Shipped scenario simulation, AI coach chat, Stripe subscription tiers, automated multilingual email reports, and full i18n across 5 languages, containerised with Docker.

p4.title: Project REACH Donation Dashboard
p4.p: Full-stack donor engagement platform built in 4 days for a Hong Kong non-profit serving 230,000 underprivileged children, targeting a ~70% donor dropout rate. Led ideation and owned the AI-generated badge system and real-time donation leaderboard. Also shipped an automated campaign newsletter system. Built on Vue.js, Tailwind CSS, Flask, Supabase, Stripe, and Resend.

p5.title: Independent Equity Research: Trip.com Group (SEHK:9961)
p5.p: Initiated coverage of Trip.com (SEHK: 9961) with a BUY recommendation and CNY 492 price target (+10.3% upside). Built a full financial model across income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, and DCF valuation over FY25–29E. Valuation anchored on 11.5x terminal EBITDA and 7.5% WACC, supported by Porter's Five Forces, peer multiples benchmarking, and sensitivity analysis.

c1.title: FinTech Innovators Hackathon 2026 — NTU NFC × Schroders
c1.p: One of 2 problem statements selected by Schroders' Digital Assets & Operations Innovation teams. Built and pitched a full-stack financial wellness platform within a 7-day seeding window. Obtained Honourable Mention (Top 8 out of 90+ Teams).

c2.title: Morgan Stanley CodeToGive Asia Hackathon 2025
c2.p: Selectively chosen to represent NTU in a cross-university hackathon organised by Morgan Stanley, competing against 10–20 teams across Hong Kong and Singapore. Teams were tasked with building a technology solution for a real non-profit within 4 days. Our team was assigned Project REACH, an education equity charity serving underprivileged children in Hong Kong. Obtained Top 4 out of 20+ Teams.

tutoring.heading: Helping students excel in English, Mathematics & Sciences
tutoring.p1: Beyond my academic pursuits, I run a private tutoring service providing one-to-one home tuition. This venture has sharpened my ability to break down complex concepts, adapt to different learning styles, and build meaningful mentor–student relationships.
tutoring.p2: Teaching has taught me that true understanding comes from being able to explain something simply; a principle I apply to every technical challenge I face.
tutoring.hl_programming: Programming Basics (Primary to JC; Adults welcome!)

contact.description: I am actively seeking opportunities in quantitative research, data science, and machine learning. Whether you have a role in mind, want to discuss a project, or simply want to connect; my inbox is always open.
